creator: c.kworr@gmail.com
text:
The prot installs fine, but if port is already installed build step is skipped:

# make clean
===>  Cleaning for gosqlite3-20120330
# make
===>   gosqlite3-20120330 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by gosqlite3-20120330 for building
===>  Extracting for gosqlite3-20120330
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for gosqlite3-20120330.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for gosqlite3-20120330
===>   gosqlite3-20120330 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/go - found
===>   gosqlite3-20120330 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/ccache - found
===>   gosqlite3-20120330 depends on shared library: sqlite3 - found
===>  Configuring for gosqlite3-20120330
===>  Building for gosqlite3-20120330
#

Thus installations step fails as there is nothing to install.
